user.title: AlphaESS Modbus TCP
user.description: Connect to your AlphaESS inverter via Modbus TCP. Make sure the inverter is reachable on the local network.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the inverter. Check the IP address, port, and that Modbus TCP is enabled on the inverter.

force_charging.name: Force Charging
force_charging.description: Forces the battery to charge from the grid at the configured power. Stops after the set duration or when SoC reaches the cutoff. Turns off any other active dispatch switch.

force_charging_hold.name: Force Charging Hold
force_charging_hold.description: When enabled, Force Charging will not return to self-consumption mode when the duration expires or the SoC cutoff is reached. Instead a neutral hold dispatch keeps the inverter in dispatch mode to prevent the battery discharging. Turn Force Charging off to return to normal operation.

force_discharging.name: Force Discharging
force_discharging.description: Forces the battery to discharge at the configured power. Stops after the set duration or when SoC falls to the cutoff. Turns off any other active dispatch switch.

force_export.name: Force Export
force_export.description: Forces the battery to discharge to the grid at the configured power. Stops after the set duration or when SoC falls to the cutoff. Turns off any other active dispatch switch.

dispatch.name: Dispatch
dispatch.description: Sends a manual dispatch command using the configured power, mode, SoC target and duration. Turns off any other active dispatch switch.

excess_export.name: Excess Export
excess_export.description: Dynamically exports excess PV and battery power to keep net grid flow near zero. Recalculates every 4 minutes. Turns off any other active dispatch switch.

excess_export_pause.name: Excess Export Pause
excess_export_pause.description: Temporarily pauses Excess Export without cancelling it. Turn off to immediately resume exporting.

force_import.name: Force Import
force_import.description: Imports from the grid at the configured power, dynamically adjusted for live house load and PV so total grid draw stays at the target. Recalculates every 25 seconds. Stops after the set duration or when SoC reaches the cutoff. Turns off any other active dispatch switch.

force_import_hold.name: Force Import Hold
force_import_hold.description: When enabled, Force Import will not return to self-consumption mode when the duration expires or the SoC cutoff is reached. The dispatch continues refreshing to hold the battery at the target SoC and prevent discharge. Turn Force Import off to return to normal operation.

force_import_pause.name: Force Import Pause
force_import_pause.description: Temporarily pauses Force Import without cancelling it. Turn off to immediately resume importing.

smart_export.name: Smart Export
smart_export.description: Exports up to Max Export Power to the grid, dynamically accounting for live house load and PV production. Recalculates every 30 seconds. Turns off any other active dispatch switch.

charging_cutoff_soc.name: Charging Cutoff SoC
charging_cutoff_soc.description: SoC at which the inverter's scheduled grid charging (time period control) stops.

discharging_cutoff_soc.name: Discharging Cutoff SoC
discharging_cutoff_soc.description: Minimum SoC at which the inverter's scheduled battery discharge stops.

max_feed_to_grid.name: Max Feed to Grid
max_feed_to_grid.description: Maximum percentage of inverter capacity that can be exported to the grid.

force_charging_power.name: Force Charging Power
force_charging_power.description: Charging rate from the grid when Force Charging is active.

force_charging_cutoff_soc.name: Force Charging Cutoff SoC
force_charging_cutoff_soc.description: Force Charging stops when the battery reaches this SoC.

force_charging_duration.name: Force Charging Duration
force_charging_duration.description: How long Force Charging runs before switching off automatically.

force_discharging_power.name: Force Discharging Power
force_discharging_power.description: Discharge rate when Force Discharging is active.

force_discharging_cutoff_soc.name: Force Discharging Cutoff SoC
force_discharging_cutoff_soc.description: Force Discharging stops when the battery falls to this SoC.

force_discharging_duration.name: Force Discharging Duration
force_discharging_duration.description: How long Force Discharging runs before switching off automatically.

force_export_power.name: Force Export Power
force_export_power.description: Grid export rate when Force Export is active.

force_export_cutoff_soc.name: Force Export Cutoff SoC
force_export_cutoff_soc.description: Force Export stops when the battery falls to this SoC. Also used as the SoC floor by Smart Export.

force_export_duration.name: Force Export Duration
force_export_duration.description: How long Force Export runs before switching off automatically.

dispatch_power.name: Dispatch Power
dispatch_power.description: Power level for the Dispatch switch. Positive = discharge / export, negative = charge / import.

dispatch_cutoff_soc.name: Dispatch Cutoff SoC
dispatch_cutoff_soc.description: Dispatch stops when the battery reaches this SoC (SoC Control mode only).

dispatch_duration.name: Dispatch Duration
dispatch_duration.description: How long the Dispatch switch runs before switching off automatically.

force_import_power.name: Force Import Power
force_import_power.description: Target total grid import rate when Force Import is active. Actual battery charge rate adjusts dynamically based on live house load and PV.

force_import_cutoff_soc.name: Force Import Cutoff SoC
force_import_cutoff_soc.description: Force Import stops when the battery reaches this SoC.

force_import_duration.name: Force Import Duration
force_import_duration.description: How long Force Import runs before switching off automatically.

max_export_power.name: Max Export Power
max_export_power.description: Maximum grid export rate for the Smart Export switch.

charging_discharging_settings.name: Charging / Discharging Settings
charging_discharging_settings.description: Enables or disables the inverter's built-in scheduled grid charging and battery discharge time windows.

dispatch_mode.name: Dispatch Mode
dispatch_mode.description: Algorithm the inverter uses while a Dispatch command is active. SoC Control (2) is used by all dispatch switches in this integration.

inverter_ac_limit.name: Inverter AC Limit
inverter_ac_limit.description: Your inverter's maximum AC output rating. Used by Excess Export to cap dispatch power and avoid overloading the inverter.

dispatch_reset.name: Dispatch Reset
dispatch_reset.description: Immediately stops any active dispatch command and returns the inverter to normal operation.

synchronise_date_time.name: Synchronise Date & Time
synchronise_date_time.description: Writes the current Home Assistant date and time to the inverter's internal clock.

sync_dispatch_state.name: Sync Dispatch State
sync_dispatch_state.description: Reconciles HA switch states with the inverter. If dispatch is running but no switch shows on (e.g. after an integration reload), marks the Dispatch switch as on. If no dispatch is running but a switch shows on, clears it.

restart_pcs.name: Restart PCS
restart_pcs.description: Restarts the Power Conversion System (inverter) software. Use for remote troubleshooting when the inverter is behaving unexpectedly.

restart_ems.name: Restart EMS
restart_ems.description: Restarts the Energy Management System software. Use for remote troubleshooting when scheduling or dispatch behaviour is incorrect.

reset_energy_totals.name: Reset Energy Totals
reset_energy_totals.description: WARNING: Clears all lifetime energy counters stored on the inverter. This cannot be undone. Only use this if you have intentionally replaced the inverter or need to zero out the totals.
